items.name: 栁沢家のアサダ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.name_en: Japanese Hop-Hornbeam (Asada) of the Yanagisawa Family
en.description_en: A monument in the natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu) category. It is a town-designated (machi-shitei) cultural property of Hashikami Town, located in Tsunogaori, Yanagidaira. Designated on 2017-03-27.

A folk cultural property in the intangible folk cultural property (mukei minzoku bunkazai) category. It is a town-designated (machi-shitei) cultural property of Hashikami Town. Designated on 2008-03-21.
